title: Define local-first assistant action contracts
description: Add typed contracts for action definitions, requests, results, executors, workflow executor, privacy level, input kind, and output target without wiring UI yet.
acceptance_criteria: Contracts compile and tests cover validation for input/output/privacy metadata; no clipboard content is logged.
review_initial_requirements: Reviewer confirms contracts are small and do not implement broad assistant behavior.
review_regression_requirements: Run new assistant-core tests plus dotnet test GestureClip.sln --nologo --verbosity minimal.
notes: Start with interfaces and records only.

title: Add quick action center MVP
description: Create searchable local action palette that lists deterministic built-in actions and can run selected action with explicit user input.
acceptance_criteria: Palette opens from hotkey or settings command; action search is keyboard-friendly; no AI/network action appears by default.
review_initial_requirements: Reviewer confirms UI is discoverable but small and does not become a chat app.
review_regression_requirements: Run action center viewmodel tests; manually open palette and run one local action.

title: Implement local clipboard text actions
description: Add deterministic text actions: trim, normalize whitespace, case convert, JSON format/minify, URL encode/decode, quote/unquote.
acceptance_criteria: Actions operate on selected text or chosen clipboard item; tests prove output and capture suppression; diagnostics do not include raw text.
review_initial_requirements: Reviewer confirms actions are local-only and deterministic.
review_regression_requirements: Run clipboard action tests plus diagnostics privacy tests.

title: Bind gestures to workflow chains
description: Allow gesture bindings to run a versioned sequence of assistant action ids with typed input/output validation.
acceptance_criteria: Existing built-in gesture tests still pass; workflows stop safely on invalid input or failure; no mouse-up/end event is dropped.
review_initial_requirements: Reviewer checks gesture lifecycle safety and no broad hook changes.
review_regression_requirements: Run gestures tests and manually trigger one workflow gesture.

title: Ship safe preset commands
description: Add reviewed presets: search selected text, paste latest, format clipboard JSON, open settings, export diagnostics, quick copy cleanup.
acceptance_criteria: Presets are allowlisted; settings can enable/disable them; tests cover command mapping and labels.
review_initial_requirements: Reviewer rejects arbitrary shell command editing for first pass.
review_regression_requirements: Run preset tests; manually execute two presets.

title: Add settings model and privacy boundaries
description: Persist action/workflow settings as versioned JSON and add privacy controls for local-only versus opt-in network actions.
acceptance_criteria: Settings save/reload works; invalid config falls back safely; network/AI actions disabled by default; diagnostics redact action inputs.
review_initial_requirements: Reviewer confirms privacy wording is explicit and no hidden upload path exists.
review_regression_requirements: Run settings tests and diagnostics privacy tests; manually change one action setting and restart.
notes: Do not redesign full settings UI.

title: Create Niuma assistant regression pack
description: Add a small repeatable regression command pack for assistant contracts, clipboard actions, gesture workflows, presets, settings, and diagnostics privacy.
acceptance_criteria: Script runs from repo root and exits nonzero on failures; full suite still passes.
review_initial_requirements: Reviewer confirms script is repo-relative and copy-pasteable.
review_regression_requirements: Run new script and dotnet test GestureClip.sln --nologo --verbosity minimal.
notes: Can extend existing gesture pack or add a separate assistant pack.

title: Review phase-2 assistant readiness
description: Review all assistant phase-2 rows against privacy, UX, gesture safety, and release readiness.
acceptance_criteria: All rows have evidence; no gate falsely marked complete; final risk list exists.
review_initial_requirements: Reviewer checks original design scope was respected.
review_regression_requirements: Run assistant regression pack, full suite, startup smoke, and manual quick action workflow smoke.
notes: Only after user approves this draft.
